title: Intex 59416NP Crystal Blue Three Ring Inflatable Paddling Pool 1.14m x 25cm

We’re part of a worldwide family of companies with more than 50 years of history behind us. Intex Crystal Blue Three Ring Inflatable Paddling Pool Escape the summer heat with the Intex Crystal Blue Inflatable Pool! It´s the perfect addition to any back yard or patio and at 6-1⁄2in water depth, it´s just the right amount of water for the little ones to cool off in.
